Most food businesses
don't survive year one.

Usually the food was fine. The guessing killed it: wrong spot, wrong prices, wrong suppliers, and the savings ran out first.

01

Nobody knows the brand

An unknown sign gets walked past. You burn months and real money just getting people to try you once.

02

You can't get the good spots

The spots with real foot traffic are already taken. Without a crowd, even great food just sits there.

03

You drown in the details

Menu, suppliers, pricing, staff, permits. Every decision is new to you, and each mistake has a price tag.

Don't gamble your savings on an experiment. Start with a system that already works.

The Tokyo Tempura Franchise:
everything to open, in one package.

Not just a name and a handshake. You get a business that's ready to run on day one.

A brand people already trust. The tempura people already know from the mall, working for you on day one.

Your complete cart & equipment. Set up, branded, and ready to serve. No sourcing gear yourself.

The exact recipes & menu. The same taste customers come back for, consistent every time.

A ready supplier chain. Ingredients sorted and priced. No scrambling, no guessing on quality.

Hands-on training. For you and your crew: cooking, serving, and running the cart until you're confident.

Location assistance. We help you land a high-traffic spot where customers actually walk past.

Launch & marketing kit. Signage, materials, and an opening plan built to pull a crowd from week one.

A franchise coach in your corner. Guidance that doesn't stop after you sign. It lasts as long as you're running.

One package, all-in
Packages start at ₱399,999
Everything above in one clear investment. No surprise add-ons after you sign.
Ask about packages

Serious about the numbers? On your first call, ask for the average daily sales range, payback estimate, and territory & renewal terms. We walk you through all of it.

Also from Jwein Food Corp, the family behind Tokyo Tempura

One store. Four brands.
Meet The Red Bus.

A multi-brand store from 9 to 25 sqm that runs the four strongest brands for its location, picked from the five-brand portfolio. Same coach, same system, bigger menu.

Tokyo TempuraBurritoMNLNacho KingGryn WasabiSago Loco
  • All-in: equipment, smallwares, initial inventory, and training for all 4 brands
  • Drive-through, walk-in, or indoor formats, solar-powered with a cloud kitchen
  • Launch support: free-taste day, flyers, Meta boosting, and an influencer campaign
  • 3-year term with a 3-year renewal option
₱1,999,999All-in turnkey package
Ask about The Red Bus

Budget separately for permits (approx. ₱40,000) plus rent and deposit, which vary by site.

More ways to franchise with us.

Tokyo Tempura is one of five brands under Jwein Food Corp. Each has its own cart, its own crowd, and its own franchise path.

Gryn Wasabi

The sushi carousel cart. Pick what you want, pay for what you pick, from ₱25 a piece.

View the brand →

BurritoMNL

Fil-Mex burritos made for the Filipino palate. Delicious need not be expensive.

View the brand →

Tokyo Tempura · BurritoMNL · Gryn Wasabi · Sago Loco

天ぷら

A proven brand. A simple product.
Massive demand.

Already in the biggest malls

SM, Robinsons, and Ayala give you foot traffic from day one. You step into demand that already exists.

A product people crave

Hot, fresh tempura by the bucket. Cheap, fast, and hard to walk past once you smell it.

Built for carts, not restaurants

Lower overhead and faster to open than a restaurant, with far less that can go wrong.

"Murang tempura" means volume

A friendly price brings repeat buyers and steady daily sales. Affordable is exactly why it moves.

Straight from the cart

Shot straight off our mall menu: the exact buckets your future customers are already lining up for.

天ぷら

From "I'm interested"
to open for business.

Message us

Tell us your city and budget, and we'll tell you honestly what's possible.

Pick your package & spot

Choose the package that fits, and we help you scout a location with real foot traffic.

Get trained

Hands-on training for you and your crew: the recipes, the service, and the day-to-day of the cart.

Launch

We help you set up the cart and open with a plan built to pull a crowd from the first day.

Grow with your coach

Ongoing guidance to keep sales climbing. You're never left to figure it out alone.

Franchise Support Team

You won't be doing this alone.

Our Franchise Department walks with you through the whole journey, from your first day of ops to your tenth year in the mall. We're the ones you call when sales dip, a supplier runs late, or you're just not sure what to do next.

Our Franchise Director leads the team, built on 14 years of running Tokyo Tempura carts, so every answer you get comes from someone who has actually run one.

We don't hand you a cart
and disappear.

Your coach is with you from signing to serving, and long after. The first conversation is free with zero obligation. Worst case, you walk away knowing exactly what it takes to run a tempura cart.
